description_long: This is a sleek, modern sport motorcycle with a streamlined, aerodynamic body finished in a glossy metallic red. The bike features a full front fairing with an integrated windshield, angular headlights, and a compact, aggressive stance. The seat is contoured for a single rider, with a raised rear section and exposed rear suspension springs in gold. Both wheels are large, with low-profile tires and visible disc brakes, and the exhaust system is prominently mounted low on the right side. The handlebars are low and forward, typical of sport bikes, and the engine casing is detailed in metallic gray and gold. The overall design suggests high performance and urban agility, suitable for city streets or highways.
description: A glossy red sport motorcycle with aerodynamic fairings, gold suspension, and a streamlined, modern design. Features include a contoured seat, low handlebars, and prominent wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular headlights, windshield, and narrow profile of the front fairing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full fairing, contoured seat, exposed gold suspension, and detailed engine components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, rear wheel, and gold exhaust, with the seat and suspension visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust system, gold suspension, and the overall aerodynamic shape.
